summary: Iter7 review tests: NEW Quick Plan flow, Plan Kickoff Execution, Super Admin endpoints, Encrypted Social Integrations, Chatbot. Backend pytest: 15/15 PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_quickplan_admin_social.py (35s). Frontend: all 7 reviewer items verified visually. Quick Plan tab is FIRST with EASY badge; entering budget=5000 + 6mo + deal=200 generated a result card showing 47 leads/mo, 282 total over 6 months, $5,000 monthly budget, 'UPSIDE: ~95/MO', AI rationale paragraph, 'Activate Execution Engine' CTA, and a 5-row Channel Mix table (paid+organic). Activate Execution Engine showed toast 'Scheduled 6 posts across LinkedIn, X & Blog' and redirected to /schedule after ~18s with 6 PENDING items visible across Tue 28 / Thu 30 / Sun 3. Sidebar shows ALL required sections (RUN, STRATEGY, EXECUTION ENGINE, POSTS & CONTENT, REPORTS, SETTINGS, ADMIN) and ALL labels (Dashboard, Live Analytics LIVE, Inbox, Approvals, Business Profile, Growth Studio, Leads (CRM), Lead Discovery, Campaigns, Landing Pages, Content Studio, Auto-publish AUTO, Reports & Analysis, Integrations, Team & Alerts, Billing, Super Admin PRO). /admin renders Platform Overview with 6 stat cards (20 users / 19 workspaces / 38 leads / 1 campaign / 19 content kits / 3 landing pages), Growth · Last 7 Days panel (20 new signups / 1 active), Auth provider mix (GOOGLE 1, SMS 1, EMAIL 18), Subscription mix (FREE_TRIAL 18, PRO 1), and a Recent Users · 20 table with USER/AUTH/PLAN/LEADS/CAMPS/JOINED columns. Chatbot bubble (data-testid contains 'chat') opens panel; sending 'where do I see my leads?' returned a reply linking to /leads ('You currently have 38 leads…') in ~5s. Integrations page shows all 4 social cards (LinkedIn/Facebook/Instagram/X) plus WhatsApp; LinkedIn correctly flipped to CONNECTED ON after backend POST with the encrypted token. Public Landing (/) shows hero copy 'The marketing engine that guarantees your monthly leads', recharts area chart with '+1,400% growth' and trend line, '34 conversions / -41% vs Q1 / +89% pipeline' KPIs, plus 'Sign in' & 'Start free' CTAs working.

design_issues.screen: Quick Plan tab + Lead Guarantee result card
issues: Currency symbol is hardcoded to '$' on the budget input prefix and on the result card (e.g. '$5,000 monthly budget') even though admin's business profile country=IN and backend returns currency='INR'. Backend payload contains `currency: 'INR'` in guarantee — frontend doesn't use it. Minor (cosmetic) — ₹ should render instead of $.

Landing still uses the legacy blue theme (hero CTA 'Start free' is solid blue #1B53FF, growth chart line is blue, dark-navy stats band) while the authed app is on coral/cream. Likely intentional for marketing site but worth confirming brand intent — iter6 standardised authed pages to cream + coral only.

action_items: [LOW] QuickPlanTab: use guarantee.currency / business_profile.currency_code to render the correct symbol (₹ for IN, $ for US, etc.) in budget input prefix, monthly_budget display, channel-mix CPL/budget cells. Backend already returns the correct currency code in `guarantee.currency`.
[OPTIONAL] Confirm whether the public Landing page should remain blue or be re-skinned to the cream + coral system used post-login.
critical_code_review_comments: quick_plan_generate (server.py L1966-2088) writes growth_plans with source='quick_plan'; the 50% buffer math (`max(1, int(raw_predicted * 0.5))`) does FLOOR rounding — for raw_predicted in {2,3} it gives 1 lead/mo which feels harsh. Consider `max(1, round(raw_predicted * 0.5))` to be slightly more generous when raw is small.

plan_kickoff_execution (L2098-2167) caps total_posts at 6 (line 2109) so the documented `weeks * posts_per_week` is silently truncated when >6 — UI promise '6 posts across 2 weeks' is fine but for `weeks=4, posts_per_week=3` user expects 12 and gets 6 with no warning. Either return the cap in the response or add a UI warning.

plan_kickoff_execution serially calls `content_generate` inside a for-loop with break-on-error — for 6 kits this is ~6×8-15s sequential = up to 90s wall clock. Consider asyncio.gather with bounded concurrency (e.g. 2-3 in parallel) to halve user wait. Reviewer note already calls out 90s timeout.

save_social_creds (L4125) calls `_enc(payload.access_token)` — verified encrypted at rest in mongo (test passes). Good. But there is no decryption path for downstream publish workers — confirm publish code calls `_dec(token)` before posting (not in scope of iter7 tests).

admin_users (L4021-4033) hydrates leads + campaigns counts via 2 sequential count_documents per user × N users — 200 users → up to 400 round-trips. Replace with one aggregate $lookup for production scale.
assistant_chat (L4045-4092) imports Groq inside the handler on every request (`from groq import Groq as _G`). Move the import + client to module level for ~10ms latency saving per call.
All new endpoints (quick-plan, kickoff, admin/*, integrations/social, assistant/chat) live in server.py which is now ~4,445 lines — refactor into routers/ overdue (flagged iter4-6, still not done).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all 7 reviewer items (Quick Plan tab + form + result + Activate redirect, Sidebar sections+labels, Super Admin page, Chatbot reply, Integrations LinkedIn manual config (verified via backend POST + UI shows CONNECTED ON), Landing chart + CTAs)

test_credentials: admin@zeromark.ai / admin123 (admin); auto-created TEST_iter7_user_<ts>@example.com / Pass1234! (non-admin) for 403/404 negative tests.
seed_data_creation: 1 non-admin user TEST_iter7_user_<ts>@example.com created per test session (auto-cleaned by future workspace deletion). 1 quick-plan growth_plan + lead_target row upserted on admin workspace (intentional — leaves /growth Quick Plan tab in a populated state for screenshots). 6 content kits + 6 PENDING schedules created on admin workspace via kickoff endpoint (intentional — leaves /schedule populated). 1 oauth_tokens.linkedin row with encrypted access_token (then DELETE-tested → cleaned at end of TestSocialIntegrations).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter7 regression suite = /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_quickplan_admin_social.py (15 tests, ~35s with AI). Run with: `set -a; source /app/backend/.env; set +a; export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://instant-ship-2.preview.emergentagent.com; pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_quickplan_admin_social.py -v`. Quick Plan tab data-testids: quick-budget-input, quick-avg-deal, quick-goal. Currency-symbol cosmetic bug (hardcoded $ instead of using guarantee.currency=INR for ₹) is the only frontend miss — backend is correct. Activate Execution Engine takes 15-25s (AI content kit gen ×6 sequential) before redirect to /schedule — wait at least 25s in tests. Chatbot floating button uses data-testid containing 'chat'. Integrations LinkedIn already CONNECTED on admin (left over from iter7 test — DELETE /api/integrations/social/linkedin to reset).
